rulings.Case Title: GEORGE LIMPERIS VS. JIMMY JEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, March 17, 2009, line 4, DEFENDANT ROBERT MCCURN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer as to second and third causes of action sustained with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiff to plead facts with particularity regarding discovery rule. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to the sixth cause of action, barred by statute of liminations. Demurrer overruled regarding the first and seventh causes of action. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE LIMPERIS VS. JIMMY JEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, March 17, 2009, line 4, DEFENDANT ROBERT MCCURN'S Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Strike. Motion to Strike granted with ten days leave to amend to plead facts with particularity regarding discovery rule. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: MATT NAWROCKI VS. EXPRESS CONSOLIDATION, INC. DBA EXPRESS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, March 17, 2009, line 6, DEFENDANT EXPRESS CONSOLIDATION, INC. DBA EXPRESS, and, RANDALL LESHIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to the second and third causes of action. The Complaint does not plead "any damage" within the meaning of the Consumer Legal Remedies Act, or standing, under the Unfair Competition Law, B&P Code section 17500.3. Demurrer overruled as to the first cause of action. Factual issue of tax-exempt status cannot be conclusively determined on demurrer. =(302/CWW/PB)
